en.title: FLAPixel Example Vault UI
en.subtitle: Live CA Store example for a FLAPixel NFT vault. Users mint NFTs with the tax token, claim BNB dividends, and sell approved NFTs back to the vault.
en.mint.title: Mint NFT
en.claim.title: Claim dividend
en.sell.title: Sell back to vault
en.errors.stageUnavailable: This FLAPixel flow is only available after DEX listing.
en.errors.connectWallet: Connect a wallet before using vault actions.
en.errors.switchNetwork: Switch the wallet to {requiredChain} before continuing.
en.errors.insufficientTokenBalance: Insufficient token balance for this mint.
en.errors.tokenApprovalRequired: Approve the tax token before minting.
en.errors.claimUnavailable: There is no claimable BNB for this wallet.
en.errors.sellIdsRequired: Enter at least one NFT id to sell.
en.errors.nftApprovalRequired: Approve the NFT collection before selling back to the vault.
en.errors.txFailed: Transaction failed. Check the wallet prompt or contract state and try again.
en.notices.riskMissing: This Vault UI must integrate the current contract risk status before delivery. Read riskLevel from host Vault/TaxInfo context and display it prominently.
en.notices.listedOnly: This real example follows the live listed-stage vault path. Keep the action area visible, but disable writes when the host says the token is not listed.
en.notices.switchNetwork: The connected wallet is on the wrong chain. Switch to {requiredChain} before continuing with vault actions.

zh.title: FLAPixel Example Vault UI
zh.subtitle: 真实 CA Store 示例：FLAPixel NFT 金库。用户用税币兑换 NFT，领取 BNB 分红，并把已授权的 NFT 卖回金库。
zh.mint.title: 兑换 NFT
zh.claim.title: 领取分红
zh.sell.title: 卖回金库
zh.errors.stageUnavailable: 这个 FLAPixel 流程只在 DEX 上线后开放。
zh.errors.connectWallet: 请先连接钱包再使用金库操作。
zh.errors.switchNetwork: 请先把钱包切换到 {requiredChain} 再继续。
zh.errors.mintCountRequired: 请输入有效的 NFT 数量。
zh.errors.insufficientTokenBalance: 兑换所需税币余额不足。
zh.errors.claimUnavailable: 当前钱包没有可领取的 BNB。
zh.errors.sellIdsRequired: 请至少输入一个要卖回的 NFT ID。
zh.errors.nftApprovalRequired: 卖回前请先授权 NFT 集合。
zh.errors.txFailed: 交易失败。请检查钱包弹窗或合约状态后重试。
zh.notices.riskMissing: 这个 Vault UI 必须接入当前合约风险状态后才能交付。请从 host Vault/TaxInfo context 读取 riskLevel，并在界面中显著展示。
zh.notices.listedOnly: 这个真实示例走的是线上已上架金库流程。即便 host 说当前 token 未上架，也应该保留操作区，只把不可写按钮禁掉。
zh.notices.switchNetwork: 当前钱包链不对。请先切换到 {requiredChain}，再继续金库操作。
